description: Standard nightly ops: cleanup, code quality, audit, hygiene, morning prep

phases.name: Cleanup
phases.description: Commit dirty files, prune worktrees, drop stale stashes

tasks.instructions_template:
Perform Phase 1 core repo cleanup in ~/clawd/core:
1. Commit any dirty tracked files (git add -u && git commit -m 'chore: nightly cleanup'). Skip src/voice/router.ts - it is deprecated and intentionally dirty.
2. Drop stale git stashes: list with 'git stash list', drop any stash older than 30 days or with message 'preserve unrelated edits' beyond stash@{3}. Keep the 4 most recent.
3. Run 'git worktree prune --verbose' in both ~/clawd/core and ~/clawd.
Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase1-cleanup-{DATE}.md

Commit any untracked or modified files in ~/clawd workspace (not core). Run 'git -C ~/clawd status --short', stage anything relevant (scripts, memory, artifacts, config), commit with 'chore: nightly workspace sync'. Write a brief summary to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase1-workspace-{DATE}.md

phases.name: Code Quality
phases.description: TypeScript check, lint, format, test suite on core

tasks.instructions_template:
Run TypeScript and lint checks on ~/clawd/core:
1. cd ~/clawd/core && pnpm tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 (note any new errors vs pre-existing ui/ errors)
2. pnpm check 2>&1 | tail -30
3. If format issues found: pnpm format:fix then re-run pnpm check
Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase2-tsgo-lint-{DATE}.md. Note: ~411 pre-existing ui/ errors are expected and not regressions.

Run the full test suite on ~/clawd/core:
cd ~/clawd/core && OPENCLAW_TEST_PROFILE=low OPENCLAW_TEST_SERIAL_GATEWAY=1 pnpm test --run 2>&1 | tail -80
Note any new failures vs the baseline of 47 pre-existing failures. Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase2-tests-{DATE}.md with pass/fail counts and any new failures highlighted.

phases.name: Nightly Audit
phases.description: Spark nightly report and preflight scripts

tasks.instructions_template: Run the Spark nightly report script: ~/clawd/scripts/spark_nightly_report.sh 2>&1 | tail -40. If it times out or errors, retry. Write a brief status to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase3-spark-report-{DATE}.md

Run the AII preflight script in quick mode: ~/clawd/scripts/spark_aii_preflight.sh --quick 2>&1 | tail -40. If it errors, retry. Write status to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase3-aii-preflight-{DATE}.md

phases.name: Repository Hygiene
phases.description: CI status, stale branch cleanup, worktree assessment

tasks.instructions_template:
Run repo hygiene checks:
1. Delete merged branches in ~/clawd/core: git branch --merged main | grep -v 'main' | xargs git branch -d
2. Check CI status on open AI Integrations PRs: gh pr list --repo AI-Integrations/aiva-api --state open --json number,title,statusCheckRollup | head -5
3. Verify all LaunchAgents are healthy: launchctl list | grep -E 'clawd|aiintegrations'
Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase4-hygiene-{DATE}.md

phases.name: Morning Prep
phases.description: Push, summary, Desktop delivery. Depends on phases 1-4.

tasks.instructions_template:
Run morning prep:
1. Push core: cd ~/clawd/core && git push aii-private main && git push fork main
2. Push workspace: cd ~/clawd && git push origin $(git branch --show-current)
3. Read all phase artifact files from tonight and write a unified overnight summary to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/overnight-summary-{DATE}.md. Include: what ran, what passed, what failed, top 3 items for Spencer.
4. Copy to Desktop: cp ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/overnight-summary-{DATE}.md ~/Desktop/overnight-summary-{DATE}.md
5. Update ~/clawd/memory/skills-and-ops.md with any new operational notes.
